reviews.review_description: When you start the game looks cool but the gameplay gets boring and repetitive. There is also no use of the VR system besides the controllers. Its like playing an arcade game on a phone.A cool way to add player involvement would be to make the view first person instead of 3rd person. Then add like a bat so the player has to hit the ball. The movement shoud be like arm swinging to run from side to side to hit the ball

developer_response.body: Thank you very much for your valuable feedback. We greatly appreciate your suggestions and insights shared in your review. Our team is diligently working on future updates and improvements for Rebeloid, and your input will certainly be taken into consideration as we strive to enhance the game further. Once again, thank you for taking the time to share your thoughts with us. Your support means a lot to the Rebeloid team.

reviews.review_title: Great pick up and play game!
reviews.review_description: A great pick up and play game with a new twist to the classic block breaker. The enemies and levels are varied and the boss battles are challenging. This will keep you occupied for hours on end. Definitely worth a try!

developer_response.body: Thank you very much for your glowing review. We're constantly striving to make our game even better, and your feedback encourages us to keep pushing the boundaries and exploring new ideas. Thank you for being part of our gaming community and for your support.

reviews.review_description: Unfortunately, the game is poorly presented. It would be more successful if we could change the display position, like in the classic display of a brick game, for example: Tetris VR. Everything is in place to make this game a success, but the horizontal position of the board is not a good idea and is not enjoyable to play. Set the brick board upright, not horizontal. thank’s

developer_response.body:
Thank you very much for playing our game. We genuinely value any feedback, as they help us understand how to improve and better cater to our players' experiences. 
We hope you'll consider giving our game another chance in the future, as we're committed to delivering a gaming experience that resonates with our players. Thank you for taking the time to share your thoughts with us.
